scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:pages: PORT=4173 BASE_PATH=/SolarHarmonicsConsole/ pnpm --filter @workspace/solar-sim run build && rm -rf assets && cp -r artifacts/solar-sim/dist/public/assets assets && cp artifacts/solar-sim/dist/public/index.html index.html && cp artifacts/solar-sim/dist/public/favicon.svg favicon.svg && cp artifacts/solar-sim/dist/public/opengraph.jpg opengraph.jpg && touch .nojekyll
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
